audit_items.proof_trace: At L350-352, the if/else branch is mutually exclusive: `asset == s_assetOut` triggers `safeTransfer(s_assetOutReceiver, balanceOf(address(this)))` (full balance), while `s_auctionStarts[asset] = block.timestamp` lives exclusively in the else branch (L353). An exhaustive grep confirms `s_auctionStarts` is written only at L353; therefore `s_auctionStarts[assetOut]` is never set. Both conditions of the property hold by construction.
